title: hieracium crocatum subsp. phrissoides
side_effects: Hieracium crocatum subsp. phrissoides can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its extracts has been linked to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as interact with certain medications. In rare cases, improper use of this plant may also lead to more severe reactions, including anaphylaxis and respiratory distress. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Hieracium crocatum subsp. phrissoides or any other plant for medicinal purposes.
